summary: Completed comprehensive testing of SmartFlow AI Traffic Management System. Backend APIs working at 93.3% success rate, frontend fully functional with perfect dark theme implementation and real-time data integration.

flaky_endpoints.issue: Returns 520 server error during video upload processing
flaky_endpoints.impact: Video upload functionality not working, but mock detection structure is ready for YOLO integration

passed_tests: Dashboard displays all metrics correctly (4/5 intersections, 31.2 mph avg speed, 180 vehicles, 2 incidents)
Navigation between all 7 pages working perfectly
Dark theme implementation matches design guidelines exactly
Vehicle detection logs with filtering (5 vehicle types, 100+ detections)
Incident management with status filtering and resolution
Video feeds display with 4 camera feeds and upload interface
Analytics charts displaying historical data (Traffic Volume, Avg Speed, Queue Length, Vehicle Distribution)
Live traffic map with real-time intersection data
Real-time data updates every 5 seconds on dashboard
All backend APIs working except video upload (14/15 endpoints - 93.3% success)
System status indicators and live badges
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix video upload endpoint /api/feeds/upload - currently returning 520 server error during video processing. The backend structure is ready for YOLO integration but the video processing function has issues.

success_percentage.frontend: 98% (all pages and features working, minor testid missing)
